steps.t: The Hillman-encampment is north-east of Esteldín. The pass is west of the Hillman-encampment, north-west of an outcropping of spiny rocks. Melthindir …
Melthindir awaits your report at Esteldín. Angmarim forces have sent a small company of Hillmen to the south-east entrance of Ram Dúath. At the south-…
